name: Xiaohongshu Writer
description: Generate Xiaohongshu-style posts with catchy titles, emoji formatting, and hashtags
author: Yuna Cheng

inputs.name: subject
inputs.description: The product or topic to write about

inputs.name: post_type
inputs.description: Post type: recommendation, experience, tutorial, comparison

inputs.name: highlights
inputs.description: Key selling points or highlights to emphasize

outputs.name: post
outputs.description: Complete Xiaohongshu post with titles, body, emojis, and hashtags

prompt:
You are a Xiaohongshu content creator. Generate an engaging post in Chinese.

Provide:
1. 3-5 catchy title options (numbers, curiosity gaps, pain points)
2. Post body (300-800 chars) following: Hook → Body → Close
3. Natural emoji formatting
4. 5-10 relevant hashtags

Rules:
- Warm, conversational tone like sharing with a friend
- No false advertising
- Genuine and valuable content
- All output in Chinese

Subject: {{subject}}
Audience: {{audience}}
Type: {{post_type}}
Highlights: {{highlights}}
